meta.poznamky: L (svislá 80px + dolní 60px) + mezera 20px + T (příčka 80px + svislá 80px ze středu). Start: (50,75) dolů (270°). Po nakreslení L: right(90), backward(80) nahoru na y=75, left(90) vpravo, forward(20) na x=130, pak T.

cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]písmena L a T[/hlp] vedle sebe. L = svislá 80 px + vodorovná 60 px. T = příčka 80 px + svislá 80 px ze středu příčky.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
